exposure_diagnostics.industry_neutrality: not testable: the PIT data has no historical industry labels

interpretation_limits: This is a signal first-look, not a CNY 2.1m portfolio return backtest.
B070 is a liquid HS300/CSI500/SSE50-derived PIT subset, not the full A-share market; microcap reversal is not tested.
Qfq OHLC is suitable for return labels but cannot certify 100-share lot sizing, historical capacity, or broker fills.
Historical PIT industry, ST flags, exact exchange limit prices, corporate actions, and a delist cash ledger are unavailable.
The input caches are gitignored; hashes identify this run but a fresh clone cannot rebuild it.
A long-short spread is not implementable evidence when its profit is concentrated in shorting past winners.
Signals with no later tradeable entry are absent from the shared event labeler rather than retained as cash; the count is disclosed.
No broker, paper account, product strategy, or production configuration was touched.

n20_exit_stress.rule: ret_20=-100% for non-right-censored missing paths and exits delayed more than 20 ticker records

protocol.contamination: C2-DIRECT: repository dates and related momentum/reversal results were previously inspected; any positive result is capped at paper candidate pending genuinely prospective evidence
protocol.entry_limit_rule: freeze quintiles at signal date; inferred next-open limit-up names keep their intended long-only weight in cash and are not replaced
protocol.execution_label: first later tradestatus=1 open; N1 earliest legal T+1 close; N20/N60 first tradeable close at or after the frozen session target
protocol.formation: complete month-end close and the adjusted close exactly 20 market sessions earlier
protocol.inference: monthly Spearman rank IC, Newey-West lag 3, circular 6-month block bootstrap with 5000 draws
protocol.theory: Zhang and Zhu (2024) report strong short-horizon contrarian effects in China and attribute them to the T+1 mechanism; their abstract also states that the winner reversal dominates and both winner and loser portfolios can fall, so this test requires an independently profitable past-loser long leg
protocol.universe: latest B070 PIT 800-member snapshot visible at each month-end
